sections.name: Responsory1
lines: R. God possessed me in the beginning, before he made the earth, before he created the depths, before he caused the fountains of water to spring.
* Before the mountains were settled, before there were any hills, the Lord begat me.
V. When he prepared the heavens, I was there with him, ordering all things.
R. Before the mountains were settled, before there were any hills, the Lord begat me.
